howItWorks.intro: This air fryer conversion calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Temperature Conversion
rules.explanation: Air fryers run hotter effectively due to compact size and rapid air circulation.

rules.name: Time Conversion
rules.formula: Air Fryer Time = Oven Time x 0.75 (approx.)
rules.explanation: Cooking time is typically 20-30% less in an air fryer.

howItWorks.outro: Cooking times and measurements can vary by equipment and altitude. Adjust based on your specific setup.

faq.q: What is the general rule for converting oven to air fryer?
faq.a: Reduce temperature by 25 degrees F and reduce cooking time by 20-25%. Air fryers circulate hot air more efficiently than ovens, so food cooks faster and browns better at lower temperatures.

faq.q: Do I need to preheat an air fryer?
faq.a: Most air fryers reach temperature in 2-3 minutes. Preheating for 3 minutes is recommended for best results, especially for meats and baked goods. For frozen foods, preheating is less critical.
